
- **Giving grade points according to GARP:** A replication exercise ([pdf](portfolio/garp.pdf)). For Applied Microeconomics, ITAM. December 2023.

- **Corruption or incompentence?** Disentanle through learning ([pdf](portfolio/corruption.pdf)). B.A. dissertation, ITAM. February 2023.

- **Poder de mercado laboral y brecha de género** ([pdf](portfolio/monopsony.pdf)). Presented in [COFECE Essay contest](https://www.cofece.mx/revista-del-premio-cofece-de-ensayo-2021/). May 2021.
